entries.name: Shiv
entries.desc:
Attack with your off-hand, dealing 2 Physical damage, dispelling all enrage effects and applying a concentrated form of your active Non-Lethal poison.

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Blind
entries.desc: Blinds the target, causing it to wander disoriented for 1 min. Damage may interrupt the effect. Limit 1.

entries.name: Cloak of Shadows
entries.desc: Provides a moment of magic immunity, instantly removing all harmful spell effects. The cloak lingers, causing you to resist harmful spells for 5 sec.

entries.name: Toxic Stiletto
entries.desc: Shiv's Energy cost is reduced by 20, its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec, and its range is increased by 3 yds.

entries.name: Fleet Footed
entries.desc: Movement speed increased by 15%.

entries.name: Gouge
entries.desc:
Gouges the eyes of an enemy target, incapacitating for 4 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect.

Must be in front of your target.

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Airborne Irritant
entries.desc: Blind has 50% reduced cooldown, 70% reduced duration, and applies to all nearby enemies.

entries.name: Thrill Seeking
entries.desc: Shadowstep has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Shadowrunner
entries.desc: While Stealth or Shadow Dance is active, you move 20% faster.

entries.name: Master Poisoner
entries.desc: Increases the non-damaging effects of your weapon poisons by 20%.

entries.name: Elusiveness
entries.desc: Evasion also reduces damage taken by 20%, and Feint also reduces non-area-of-effect damage taken by 20%.

entries.name: Cheat Death
entries.desc: Fatal attacks instead reduce you to 7% of your maximum health. For 3 sec afterward, you take 85% reduced damage. Cannot trigger more often than once per 6 min.

entries.name: Tricks of the Trade
entries.desc: Redirects all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next damaging attack within the next 30 sec and lasting 6 sec.

entries.name: Blackjack
entries.desc: Enemies have 30% reduced damage and healing for 6 sec after Blind or Sap's effect on them ends.

entries.name: Improved Wound Poison
entries.desc: Wound Poison can now stack 2 additional times.

entries.name: Nimble Fingers
entries.desc: Energy cost of Feint and Crimson Vial reduced by 10.

entries.name: Deadened Nerves
entries.desc: Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.

entries.name: Quick Fingers
entries.desc: Increases your Agility by 3%.

entries.name: Improved Sprint
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Sprint by 60 sec.

entries.name: Superior Mixture
entries.desc: Crippling Poison reduces movement speed by an additional 10%.

entries.name: Evasion
entries.desc: Increases your dodge chance by 100% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Iron Stomach
entries.desc: Increases the healing you receive from Crimson Vial, healing potions, and healthstones by 25%.

entries.name: Virulent Poisons
entries.desc: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 10%.

entries.name: Stillshroud
entries.desc: Shroud of Concealment has 50% reduced cooldown.

entries.name: Graceful Guile
entries.desc: Feint has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Featherfoot
entries.desc: Sprint increases movement speed by an additional 30% and has 4 sec increased duration.

entries.name: Numbing Poison
entries.desc: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, clouding their mind and slowing their attack and casting speed by 15% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Atrophic Poison
entries.desc: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by 3.0% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Deadly Precision
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your attacks that generate combo points by 5%.

entries.name: Sanguine Vial
entries.desc: When you deal the killing blow to a target that yields experience or honor, the cooldown of Crimson Vial is reduced by 15 sec and your next use heals 5% of your health instantly.

entries.name: Deep Cuts
entries.desc: Your finishing moves deal 6% increased damage.

entries.name: Unbreakable Stride
entries.desc: Reduces the duration of movement slowing effects 30%.

entries.name: Danger Sense
entries.desc: You have a 20% chance to partially evade any damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by 20%.

entries.name: Swift Slasher
entries.desc: Slice and Dice grants additional attack speed equal to 100% of your Haste.

entries.name: Improved Ambush
entries.desc: Ambush generates 1 additional combo point.

entries.name: Tight Spender
entries.desc: Energy cost of finishing moves reduced by 6%.

entries.name: Leeching Poison
entries.desc: Adds a Leeching effect to your Lethal poisons, granting you 3.0% Leech.

entries.name: Lethality
entries.desc: Critical strike chance increased by 1%. Critical strike damage bonus of your attacks that generate combo points increased by 10%.

entries.name: Recuperator
entries.desc: Slice and Dice heals you for up to 1% of your maximum health per 3 sec.

entries.name: Alacrity
entries.desc: Haste increased by 1.5%.

entries.name: Soothing Darkness
entries.desc: You are healed for 30% of your maximum health over 6 sec after activating Vanish.

entries.name: Vigor
entries.desc: Increases your maximum Energy by 50 and Energy regeneration by 5%.

entries.name: Supercharger
entries.desc:
Kingsbane supercharges 1 combo point.

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

entries.name: Subterfuge
entries.desc:
Abilities requiring Stealth can be used for 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

Combat benefits requiring Stealth persist for an additional 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

entries.name: Thistle Tea
entries.desc:
Restore 100 Energy.

When your Energy is reduced below 30, drink a Thistle Tea.

entries.name: Cold Blooded Killer
entries.desc: Critically striking with an attack that generates combo points increases the critical strike chance of your next finishing move by 10%.

entries.name: Echoing Reprimand
entries.desc: After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Mutilate also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing 40 Physical damage.

entries.name: Forced Induction
entries.desc: Increase the bonus granted when a damaging finishing move consumes a supercharged combo point by 1.

entries.name: Deeper Stratagem
entries.desc:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

entries.name: Without a Trace
entries.desc: Vanish has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Deadly Poison
entries.desc: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy for 27 Nature damage over 12 sec. Subsequent poison applications will instantly deal 2 Nature damage.

entries.name: Motivated Murderer
entries.desc: Increases your Energy regeneration by 20%.

entries.name: Improved Poisons
entries.desc: Increases the application chance of your weapon poisons by 5%.

entries.name: Path of Blood
entries.desc: Increases maximum Energy by 50.

entries.name: Crimson Tempest
entries.desc:
Slash all enemies within 10 yds dealing 38 damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Copy the longest Garrote and Rupture on the enemies you hit onto up to 2 other enemies. 

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Canny Strikes
entries.desc: Increases Critical Strike chance by 2%.

entries.name: Internal Bleeding
entries.desc: Kidney Shot and Rupture also apply Internal Bleeding, dealing up to 77 Bleed damage over 6 sec, based on combo points spent.

entries.name: Improved Garrote
entries.desc: Garrote deals 50% increased damage and has no cooldown when used from Stealth and for 6 sec after breaking Stealth.

entries.name: Thrown Precision
entries.desc: Fan of Knives has 5% increased critical strike chance and its critical strikes always apply your weapon poisons.

entries.name: Seal Fate
entries.desc: Critical strikes with attacks that generate combo points grant an additional combo point per critical strike.

entries.name: Doomblade
entries.desc: Mutilate deals an additional 25% Bleed damage over 8 sec.

entries.name: Razor Wire
entries.desc: Garrote lasts 6 sec longer.

entries.name: Bloody Mess
entries.desc: Garrote and Rupture damage increased by 15%.

entries.name: Deathmark
entries.desc:
Carve a deathmark into an enemy, dealing 125 Bleed damage and restoring 80 Energy to you over 16 sec. Damage dealt to the target by your Garrote, Rupture, and Lethal Poisons is increased by 100%.

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to the target, apply it twice.

entries.name: Caustic Spatter
entries.desc:
Envenom or Kingsbane apply Caustic Spatter for 10 sec. Limit 1.

Caustic Spatter causes 20% of your Nature damage dealt to splash onto other nearby enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Sanguine Stratagem
entries.desc:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

entries.name: Intent to Kill
entries.desc: Shadowstep's cooldown is reduced by 33% when used on a target afflicted by your Garrote.

entries.name: Iron Wire
entries.desc:
Garrote silences the target for 5 sec when used from Stealth.

Enemies silenced by Garrote deal 15% reduced damage for 5 sec.

entries.name: Fatal Concoction
entries.desc: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 20%.

entries.name: Finish the Job
entries.desc: All damage you deal is increased by 10% while Deathmark is active.

entries.name: Negotiable Contract
entries.desc: If the target of your Deathmark dies, Deathmark jumps to a nearby enemy combatant for its remaining duration.

entries.name: Lethal Dose
entries.desc: Your weapon poisons and Nature or Bleed damage over time abilities deal 1% increased damage to targets for each of your lethal poison or damage over time effects on them.

entries.name: Flying Daggers
entries.desc: Fan of Knives has its radius increased to 12 yds, deals 20% more damage, and an additional 10% when striking 5 or more targets.

entries.name: Secondary Poisoning
entries.desc: When you apply a Weapon Poison with a single-target attack, you have a 50% chance to strike a nearby enemy for 5 Physical damage and apply the same Weapon Poison to them.

entries.name: Poison Bomb
entries.desc: Envenom has a 5% chance per combo point spent to smash a vial of poison at the target's location, creating a pool of acidic death that deals 54 Nature damage over 2 sec to all enemies within it.

entries.name: Systemic Failure
entries.desc: Garrote increases the damage of Ambush and Mutilate on the target by 30%.

entries.name: Venomous Wounds
entries.desc:
You regain 3 Energy each time your Garrote or Rupture deal Bleed damage to a target affected by your weapon poisons. Energy gain is reduced for bleeds beyond the first.

If an enemy dies while afflicted by your Rupture, you regain energy based on its remaining duration.

entries.name: Amplifying Poison
entries.desc: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy, dealing 2 Nature damage and applying Amplifying Poison for 12 sec. Envenom can consume 10 stacks of Amplifying Poison to deal 35% increased damage. Max 20 stacks.

entries.name: Blindside
entries.desc: Ambush and Mutilate have a 15% chance to make your next Ambush free and usable without Stealth. Chance increased to 30% if the target is under 35% health.

entries.name: Kingsbane
entries.desc:
Release a powerful poison from your weapons and inject it into your target, dealing 60 Nature damage instantly and an additional 71 Nature damage over 14 sec. 

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to a target affected by Kingsbane, Kingsbane damage increases by 20%, up to 1,000%.

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Rapid Injection
entries.desc: Envenom's effect increases the damage of Envenom by 15%.

entries.name: Shrouded Suffocation
entries.desc: Garrote damage increased by 20%. Garrote generates 2 additional combo points when used from Stealth.

entries.name: Avulsion
entries.desc: Rupture damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Zoldyck Recipe
entries.desc: Your Bleed, weapon poison, and other Nature damage is increased by 15% against targets below 35% health.

entries.name: Regicide's Reward
entries.desc: When Kingsbane ends, gain 2% haste for every 5 stacks of increased Kingsbane damage that you had, decreasing by 2% every 2 sec.

entries.name: Inspiring Strike
entries.desc: Applying Envenom while Envenom is already active causes it to increase all damage you deal by 5% in addition to increasing your poison application chance.

entries.name: Poisoner's Drive
entries.desc: Applying Envenom while Envenom is already active restores 1 combo point.

entries.name: Deadly Momentum
entries.desc: Finishing moves have a 3% chance per combo point spent to increase your chance to critically strike by 6% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Scent of Blood
entries.desc: Each enemy afflicted by your Rupture increases your Agility by 2%, up to a maximum of 20%.

entries.name: Dashing Scoundrel
entries.desc: Envenom's effect also increases the critical strike chance of your weapon poisons by 5%, and their critical strikes generate 1 Energy.

entries.name: Dragon-Tempered Blades
entries.desc: You may apply 1 additional Lethal and Non-Lethal Poison to your weapons, but they have 30% less application chance.

entries.name: Sudden Demise
entries.desc:
Bleed damage increased by 10%.

Targets below 35% health instantly bleed out and take fatal damage when the remaining Bleed damage you would deal to them exceeds 150% of their remaining health.

entries.name: Implacable
entries.desc:
Nothing will save your target from you. Envenom damage increased by 10%. When your Envenom bonus expires, gain 20% increased Energy generation for 5 sec. 

Gain an additional 15% increased Energy generation for each Envenom you used while Envenom's bonus was active, up to 80% total.

entries.name: Deal Fate
entries.desc: Mutilate, Ambush, and Fan of Knives generate 1 additional combo point when they trigger Seal Fate.

entries.name: Overflowing Purse
entries.desc: Envenom has a 15% chance to flip 3 Fatebound Coins.

entries.name: Destiny Defined
entries.desc: Sinister Strike has 5% increased chance to strike an additional time and grant Opportunity and your Fatebound Coins flipped have an additional 5% chance to match the same face as the last flip.

entries.name: Delivered Doom
entries.desc: Envenom deals 5% more damage when it consumes 5 or more combo points.

entries.name: Edge Case
entries.desc: Activating Deathmark flips a Fatebound Coin and causes it to land on its edge, counting as both Heads and Tails.

entries.name: Mean Streak
entries.desc: Fatebound Coins flipped by Envenom are 33% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

entries.name: Hand of Fate
entries.desc:
Flip a Fatebound Coin each time a finishing move consumes 5 or more combo points. Heads increases the damage of your attacks by 10%, lasting 15 sec or until you flip Tails. Tails deals 59 Cosmic damage to your target.

For each time the same face is flipped in a row, Heads increases damage by an additional 2% and Tails increases its damage by 10%.

entries.name: Lucky Coin
entries.desc:
Every 7 coin flips, keep a lucky coin that bends you towards your fate for 12 sec. Your Agility is increased by 4%, the damage and bonuses of Fatebound Coins are increased by 50%, and coin flips are 15% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

Coin flips do not count toward finding a lucky coin while you have a lucky coin.

entries.name: Rush to the Inevitable
entries.desc: Gain 5 Energy every time you flip a Fatebound Coin. Gain 15 Energy for Coins that land on their edge.

entries.name: Inexorable March
entries.desc: You cannot be slowed below 70% of normal movement speed while your Fatebound Coin flips have an active streak of at least 2 flips matching the same face.

entries.name: Death's Arrival
entries.desc: Grappling Hook may be used a second time within 3 sec with no cooldown, but its total cooldown is increased by 5 sec.

entries.name: Chosen's Revelry
entries.desc: Flipping a Fatebound Coin restores 10 health.

entries.name: Tempted Fate
entries.desc: You have a 30% chance to absorb 10% of any damage taken.

entries.name: Fate Intertwined
entries.desc: Caustic Spatter causes an additional 5% of Nature damage dealt to be dealt to affected enemies.

entries.name: Ravenholdt Mint
entries.desc: Flipping Heads increases damage by an additional 4%. Damage dealt by flipping Tails is increased by 12%.

entries.name: Sometimes Lucky
entries.desc: Critical strike chance increased by 3%.

entries.name: Controlled Chaos
entries.desc: After flipping a Fatebound Coin that ends a streak of 4 or more, flip another that matches the same face.

entries.name: Ethereal Cloak
entries.desc: Cloak of Shadows duration increased by 2 sec.

entries.name: Bait and Switch
entries.desc:
Evasion reduces magical damage taken by 15%. 

Cloak of Shadows reduces physical damage taken by 20%.

entries.name: Corrupt the Blood
entries.desc: Rupture damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Lingering Darkness
entries.desc: After Deathmark expires, gain 30% increased Nature damage for 30 sec.

entries.name: Symbolic Victory
entries.desc: Shadow Dance additionally increases the damage of your next Eviscerate or Black Powder by 15%.

entries.name: Clear the Witnesses
entries.desc: Fan of Knives damage increased by 60%.

entries.name: Singular Focus
entries.desc: Damage dealt to targets other than your Marked target deals 5% Plague damage to your Marked target.

entries.name: Shadewalker
entries.desc: Each time you consume a stack of Deathstalker's Mark, reduce the cooldown of Shadowstep by 3 sec.

entries.name: Shroud of Night
entries.desc: Shroud of Concealment duration increased by 5 sec.

entries.name: Momentum of Despair
entries.desc: If you have critically struck with Fan of Knives, increase the critical strike chance of Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Follow the Blood
entries.desc: Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest deal 30% additional damage while 2 or more enemies are afflicted with Rupture.

entries.name: Hunt Them Down
entries.desc: Auto-attacks against Marked targets deal an additional 3 Plague damage.

entries.name: Unshakeable Drive
entries.desc: When you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, the damage of your next Ambush or Mutilate is increased by 50%.

entries.name: Deathstalker's Mark
entries.desc:
Garrote applies 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to your target, unless Deathstalker's Mark is already active. You learn Mark for Death.

When you spend 5 or more combo points on attacks against a Marked target you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, dealing 54 Plague damage.


Mark for Death
Move your active Deathstalker's Mark to your target.

entries.name: Darkest Night
entries.desc:
When you consume the final Deathstalker's Mark from a target or your target dies, gain 30 Energy and Darkest Night, causing your next Envenom cast with 5 or more combo points to critically strike, deal 35% additional damage, and apply 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to the target if no other Deathstalker's Mark is active.

Envenom cast with Darkest Night does not consume a stack of active Deathstalker's Marks.

entries.name: Mass Casualty
entries.desc: Deathstalker's Mark deals 40% of its normal damage to all other enemies within 8 yds that are afflicted by Rupture.

entries.name: Quietus Celeris
entries.desc: Deathstalker's Mark has a 30% chance to immediately consume a stack when applied.

entries.name: Precise Killer
entries.desc: Critical strike damage bonus increased by 20%.
